description:
REQ-011 and REQ-015 acceptance criteria specify coverage of runs, errors, and history domains in the web UI. Currently no routes or pages exist for these. The EventsPage covers daemon events but not run artifacts.

Add:
1. Runs page — list agent runs with status, duration, model; link to JSONL output
2. Errors page — surface ErrorStore records with structured failure context
3. History page — show HistoryStore execution records with timeline view

These should use existing backend API endpoints (ao output, ao errors, ao history).

Key files: crates/orchestrator-web-server/web-ui/src/app/router.tsx, screens.tsx
title: Add web UI routes for runs, errors, and history domains
